item.title: Judges in Virginia name new U.S. attorney, then Justice Dept. fires him

item.title: As trade envoy, Prince Andrew promoted Britain and exploited his access
item.description: For a decade, Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, who was arrested on Thursday, advocated globally for U.K. trade, cooking up deals that at times made his fam...

item.title: Trump’s MAGA base raged against Iran strikes last year. This time, it’s quieter.
item.description: Although many leading MAGA voices are quieter than they were in June, some foreign policy experts who have advocated a more limited approach have cont...

item.title: Handing defeats to Trump, Supreme Court signals potential course change
item.description: A pair of rulings on tariffs and National Guard deployment mark the justices’ first major decisions against the president. More may be coming.
